chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-1216 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4851/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Respondents No.1&2 have filed their respective statements /reports, same are taken on record. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
